name: UGREEN NASync DXP8800 Plus 8-Bay NAS Enclosure - Intel i5-1235u 10-Core CPU - 8GB DDR5 RAM - Dual 10GbE Ports - 8K HDMI - Dual Thunderbolt 4 Ports - Storage drives not included - RAID JBOD/Basic/0/1/5/6/10 - Maximum Storage up to 208TB

description: 8-bay high-capacity NAS with Intel i5 processor, dual 10GbE, and Thunderbolt 4 for large-scale data management.
